clones.name: Trichocereus Pach Olivia
clones.description:
Trichocereus Olivia is a unique cactus which grows perfectly normal looking but seems to have monstrous genetics.
                It is a slow grower that only flowers once every several years.  In early 2025 i cut off a branch that basically had nowhere to grow
				and was hoping this would accelerate tip growth but so far that hasn't happened.

clones.name: Pach Oscar
clones.description:
Oscar is 4-6 seed grown plants.from the same fruit that were initially planted in one pot and then eventually in the ground as the plants got bigger.
				Some of the stems are completely normal looking and some are monstrous & crested.  Flowers occur on both the normal looking stems as well as on the monstrous / crested stems.
				Early 2025 I had to top the tallest stem of Oscar as it was too tall to reach the flowers.  Doing so seems to have forced many more flower buds to develop in the 
				crested and monstrous stems.

clones.name: Trichocereus SuperPedro x J3
clones.description:
SuperPedro x J3 was seed grown by sab member Nitrogen from Aussie sourced seeds.  Nitrogen usually planted 4-6 plants of the same hybrid in one pot to better see the various phenotypes that grew out.
				As the stems matured these variations become much more apparent.  Planting in the ground allowed the maturing to happen much faster and now there are multiple buds on 
				several different phenotypes which will allow me to produce SPxJ3 x SPxJ3 F2 seeds.
